title: Deformed Wing Virus-Induced Changes in Honey bee Reception and Preference for Pollen Scents
author: Silva, Diego
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw data from honey bees inoculated with Deformed Wing Virus (DWV) variant A, including electroantennography (EAG) and behavioral response using Y-tube olfactometry. Other information related to honey bee colonies health and qPCR curves are also included.
steps_raw: Raw data from honey bees inoculated with Deformed Wing Virus (DWV) variant A, including electroantennography (EAG) and behavioral response using Y-tube olfactometry. Other information related to honey bee colonies health and qPCR curves are also included.
